subcodes.first_line: The remembrance from the One who is Remembered be unto him who hath believed in God, the All-Powerful, the Mighty, the All-Choosing, that the remembrance and utterance may draw him nigh [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدی المذکور من آمن بالله المقتدر العزیز المختار لیجذبه الذکر و البیان
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @chastisement and requital, @call to action, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement
